flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Holmes Community College rose 29% between 2017 and 2020 ($7.2k → $9.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Holmes Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Holmes Community College rose 43% between 2006 and 2009 (19.4% → 27.8%).
